title: URAI Genesis Onboarding Film Asset Manifest
claimBoundary: All assets are launch-safe placeholder visuals. They are not real private user memories, production generated life movies, passive sensing proof, real-person clones, therapy output, or autonomous-agent proof.
negativePrompt: no gore, no explicit content, no celebrity likeness, no real person cloning, no surveillance UI, no scary robots, no dystopian exploitation, no medical claims, no legal claims, no fake user data, no readable private messages, no brand logos

assets.altText: Abstract fragments of a life scattered through a dark luminous sky.
The URAI orb gathers symbolic memory fragments into a home world.
A symbolic person walks while a memory map forms around their life.
A constellation Life Map sky with symbolic stars and relationship threads.
A glowing orb guides a selected symbolic memory star.
A symbolic Focus image for the onboarding seed memory The Night Everything Changed.
A symbolic memory road opens into a sample Replay preview.
A symbolic ground layer showing URAI council roles around a Guardian boundary.
Consent-bound private nudge examples displayed as optional cards.
A sample Life Film timeline assembled from symbolic memory stars.
A sample memory music video waveform with the lyric I was not lost. I was becoming.
Symbolic people appear as abstract emotional mirrors with a consent boundary.
Preview portals for AR, VR, and XR memory worlds.
A URAI Passport card showing private by default data ownership controls.
An anonymized and permissioned global emotional map preview.
Accessibility and legacy preview with captions, audio waves, and archive stars.
URAI Genesis final home return with orb, sky, ground, map, and Passport layers.
